body.title: CC device: CCWorkerListener as devices/claude/groundloop/runme.py
body.result: CCWorkerListener daemon created at devices/claude/groundloop/runme.py; acking Granny dispatch, nag loop running. Commit b73baafc.
body.intention: I intend that CC.0 reliably acks Granny dispatch envelopes so tickets flow without timeout-reset loops.
body.description:
CCWorkerListener wasn't running — Granny dispatched tickets but got no ack within 120s, causing dispatch timeout and retry loop. Fix: establish devices/claude/groundloop/ directory with runme.py wrapping CCWorkerListener.run_forever() and config.yaml. Runme.py is the pattern for Ground Loop supervisor to discover and manage. Started immediately; T-groundloop-cron-bootstrap wires auto-start on boot.

**Affected files:** devices/claude/groundloop/runme.py, devices/claude/groundloop/config.yaml
**Design rules:** external-state-principle (nag state in ~/.granny/nag_state/), daemon pattern (file placement)
**Scope boundary:** CC daemon only; ground loop supervisor is T-groundloop-cron-bootstrap
**Completion criteria:** CCWorkerListener running, acks Granny dispatch within poll interval, nag thread starts, commit b73baafc
